flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Alaska Pacific University rose 117% between 2021 and 2024 (16.7% → 36.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alaska Pacific University rose 113% between 2021 and 2024 (22.2% → 47.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alaska Pacific University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Alaska Pacific University rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (347 → 457).
